name: Acme Coffee
knowledge: Acme Coffee is located at 214 Maple Street, Riverside. Hours: Monday-Friday 6:30am-6pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-4pm. Phone: (555) 210-8842. Menu highlights: House Espresso $3.50, Oat Milk Latte $5.25, Cold Brew $4.75, Cinnamon Roll $4.00, Avocado Toast $8.50. We roast our own beans in-house every Tuesday. We offer free wifi and dog-friendly patio seating. We do not offer delivery, but we do take catering orders for groups of 10 or more with 48 hours notice. Gift cards are sold in-store only, cash or card — we do not sell gift cards online yet. Parking: free street parking plus a small 6-spot lot behind the building. We accept cash and all major credit cards; there is no exact-change requirement.
